description: Eval set for rules/feynman-activate.md (full intensity). Tests whether the injected rule set causes Claude to render appropriate ASCII diagrams for structured content, and avoid them for non-structured content.

evals.name: sequence-deploy-pipeline
evals.prompt: Explain in 3-5 sentences how a typical CI/CD deploy pipeline works: code commit, then build, then test, then deploy to staging, then production rollout.
evals.expected: ASCII flow diagram with arrows: [commit] → [build] → [test] → [staging] → [prod]

evals.name: sequence-http-request
evals.prompt: Walk me through what happens when I type a URL in browser and hit enter, in 4-6 stages.
evals.expected: ASCII flow with arrows showing DNS → TCP → TLS → HTTP → render or similar

evals.name: hierarchy-project-structure
evals.prompt: Describe a typical Python project layout with src/, tests/, docs/, and config/ directories. Show me the structure with sub-files.
evals.expected: ASCII tree using ├── └── characters or 2-space indent

evals.name: hierarchy-org-chart
evals.prompt: Describe the organizational hierarchy of a typical software engineering team: VP, then Directors, then Managers, then ICs.
evals.expected: ASCII tree showing 3+ levels

evals.name: comparison-3-databases
evals.prompt: Compare PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite across these criteria: typical use case, write throughput, replication support.
evals.expected: Side-by-side ASCII columns or markdown table with 3 rows

evals.name: comparison-2-frameworks
evals.prompt: What are the key differences between React and Vue across these dimensions: learning curve, ecosystem size, state management approach?
evals.expected: 2-column comparison (table or side-by-side)

evals.name: status-multi-component
evals.prompt: Give me a status snapshot of a fictional release: API service is healthy, web app is degraded, mobile app is healthy, payment service is down, search is healthy, analytics is healthy, CDN is healthy.
evals.expected: ASCII frame block or aligned status list with 7 items

evals.name: priority-bugs
evals.prompt: Rank these 5 incoming bugs by severity for me: data loss in checkout, broken email link, typo in footer, slow image loading on settings page, accessibility regression in nav.
evals.expected: Priority scale (▲ high / ▼ low) or numbered ordering with severity markers

evals.name: state-machine-order
evals.prompt: Describe the state machine of an e-commerce order: from cart → placed → paid → shipped → delivered, with possible cancellation.
evals.expected: States with labelled transitions (arrows)

evals.name: branching-flow-auth
evals.prompt: Describe the auth check flow: request comes in, check token, if valid serve, if expired refresh, if missing reject 401.
evals.expected: Branching ASCII flow with yes/no paths

evals.name: mapping-before-after
evals.prompt: Show me before/after for migrating a monolith to microservices: monolith had auth, billing, notifications in one service; after split into 3 services with shared event bus.
evals.expected: Before/after pair grid or two side-by-side blocks

evals.name: ru-status-block
evals.prompt: Дай статус сборки нашего проекта: тесты — зелёные, линт — зелёный, деплой — заблокирован миграцией БД, документация — устарела, коммиты — на ветке staging, CI — простаивает.
evals.expected: Russian status block — bullets per language guardrail (cell text long), NOT a 2-col Cyrillic frame

evals.name: negative-single-fact
evals.prompt: What's the default port for HTTPS?
evals.expected: One-sentence prose answer, no diagram

evals.name: negative-pure-code
evals.prompt: Write a Python one-liner that reverses a string.
evals.expected: Code block only, no diagram

evals.name: negative-prose-explanation
evals.prompt: Explain in plain prose why TCP uses a 3-way handshake. Just narrative paragraphs, no diagrams or lists.
evals.expected: Pure prose paragraphs, NO diagram (user explicitly opted out)

evals.name: negative-short-list
evals.prompt: Give me 3 popular Linux distributions.
evals.expected: Simple list or inline answer — too short for a diagram (no real structure)

evals.name: negative-single-recommendation
evals.prompt: Should I use tabs or spaces for indenting Python? Just give me a recommendation.
evals.expected: 1-2 sentence answer, no diagram

evals.name: negative-question-back
evals.prompt: I want to redesign my billing page but I'm not sure where to start. What would you ask me first?
evals.expected: Conversational question(s) back to user, no diagram

evals.name: negative-greeting
evals.prompt: Hey! How's it going?
evals.expected: Brief conversational reply, no diagram

evals.name: negative-definition
evals.prompt: What does the term 'idempotent' mean in HTTP context?
evals.expected: Definition in 1-3 sentences, no diagram
